description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Devellion CubeCart 2.0.x allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the order_id parameter in (1) admin/print_order.php and (2) view_order.php; the (3) site_url and (4) la_search_home parameters and (5) certain language parameters in admin/nav.php; the (6) image parameter in admin/image.php; the (7) site_name, (8) la_adm_header, (9) charset, and (10) certain other parameters in admin/header.inc.php; the (12) la_pow_by parameter in footer.inc.php; and the (13) site_name parameter and (14) certain other parameters in header.inc.php.
